Whitesboro's Favorite

The Real Deal
NY-Style Pizza
Since Day One.

Real ingredients. Real flavor. No shortcuts. Joe's Pizza has been feeding Whitesboro with honest, hand-crafted pies, wings, and subs made fresh from scratch every single day.

Order Online (315) 736-1510

Whitesboro's Best

Fresh Every Day

The Joe's Pizza Menu

From classic cheese pies to loaded specialties, wings, hot & cold subs, salads and more — all made from scratch right here in Whitesboro.

Prices shown as Cash / Card

Add Your Own Toppings

Regular toppings: Large $2.00 · Medium $1.75 · Small $1.50

Premium toppings (sausage, bacon, meatballs, ham): Large $3.00 · Medium $2.50 · Small $2.00 — add $1 for chicken

Slices: $3.50 cash / $3.63 card · All slice toppings $0.60

Celery$1.50 / $1.56
Sauces$1.00 / $1.04

Come See Us in Whitesboro

Stop in for a hot slice, call ahead for pickup, or order online for delivery. We're right on Main Street.
